keywords.note: categoryTokens = preserved full names; keywordTokens = inverted-index tokens (normalized phrases since E-class bug fix). If multi-word category names appear fragmented in keywordTokens, this is a regression of the E-class bug.

rules.name: Will of the Hive Mind
rules.description: Once per battle round, oneГӮВ model from your army with this ability can use itГӮВ when a friendly **^^Tyranids^^** unit within 12" of thatГӮВ model is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduceГӮВ the CP cost of that usage of that Stratagem by 1CP.

rules.name: Shadow in the Warp
rules.description: If your Army Faction is **^^Tyranids^^**, once per battle, inГӮВ either playerГўВҖВҷs Command phase, if one or more unitsГӮВ from your army with this ability are on the battlefield,ГӮВ you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When youГӮВ do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take aГӮВ Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit takesГӮВ such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6" of one orГӮВ more Synapse units from your army, subtract 1 fromГӮВ that test.

rules.name: Deep Strike
rules.description:
During the Declare Battle Formations step, if every model in a unit has this ability, you can set it up in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases you can set up this unit anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

If a unit with the Deep Strike ability arrives from Strategic Reserves, the controlling player can choose for that unit to be set up either using the rules for Strategic Reserves or using the Deep Strike ability.

rules.name: Synapse
rules.description:
If your Army Faction is **^^Tyranids^^**, while a **^^Tyranids^^** unit from your army is within 6" of one or moreГӮВ friendly **^^Synapse^^** models, that **^^Tyranids^^** unit is saidГӮВ to be within Synapse Range of that model and of yourГӮВ army. While a **^^Tyranids^^** unit fromГӮВ your army is withinГӮВ Synapse Range of your army:

ГўВ–В  Each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, takeГӮВ that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6.
ГўВ–В  Each time a model in that unit makes a meleeГӮВ attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic ofГӮВ that attack.

rules.name: Invulnerable Save (4+)
rules.description: This model has a 4+ invulnerable save.

rules.name: Deadly Demise
rules.description: Some models have 'Deadly Demise x' listed in their abilities. When such a model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play (if such a model is a TRANSPORT, roll before any embarked models disembark). On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by 'x' (if this is a random number, roll separately for each unit within 6").

rules.name: Paroxysm (Psychic)
rules.description: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 1, this Psyker suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.
